purpose: Declare tiering rules for bundled skills before any payload reduction or detached distribution work.

tiers.description: Skills with mirrored core contracts under core/skills and direct runtime significance.
System-owned bundled skills that preserve host or product-specific integration behavior.
Bundled skills still shipped by default today but not yet classified as runtime-core or host-required.

policy_rules: Do not remove or detach a tier until installer, runtime, and adapter callers are mapped.
Tiering is a precondition for slimming, not a proof that a payload can already be cut.
New bundled payload families should match one tier explicitly instead of defaulting to ad hoc retention.
